span.p:
GemmaPromptTokenizer
max_len=20
'What action should the robot take to {lang}?'

div.style: color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
[BOS] + prompt(20) + scene-placeholder(512) + propriop(1) + action(64) + [EOS]
= 599 token IDs
scene 位置: 258949..259460 (512 unique unused IDs)

div.style: color: rgb(10, 31, 51) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
scatter scene_e at vision-pos
scatter action_q_e at action-pos

div.style: color: rgb(34, 34, 34) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(10, 31, 51) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Gemma4TextModel · 35 layers
frozen + LoRA q_proj/v_proj r=16 α=32
~3.4 M LoRA params trainable
NO no_grad-wrap (LoRA needs grad)

span.p:
block_i (× 24) MLPResNetBlock_Pro:
3-stream attention
q from x; k_self/v_self from x
k_adapter/v_adapter from h_a[:, i+1] ⊕ p
k_task/v_task from h_t[:, i+1] (512 tokens)
RoPE on q + each k_*
tanh(g_task) gating on task stream
+ FFN (LN + Linear D→D + ReLU)
NO wrist branch (use_wrist_bridge=False)
